topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Direct navigation and browser refresh on client routes (/forecast, /subscriptions, /planning, /sync, /analytics/*) must return HTTP 200 with the SPA shell — not blank 404 pages.
Backend static file server or reverse-proxy SPA fallback; Traefik route rules on omniflow; React Router client routes.
topic_coverage.delegation_scope: backend static serving, docker-compose, Traefik labels
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: UI audit UI-001 confirmed curl 404 on all client paths while / returns 200.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Fallback must not break /api/v1/*, /analytics/grafana/* proxy, or OIDC /callback; applies to localhost:18080 override and financegnome.omniflow.cc external profile.
curl returns 200 + HTML for /forecast, /subscriptions, /planning; hard-refresh in browser renders page; omniflow external profile regression.
Operator can bookmark and share any in-app URL; refresh on deep link works on local and omniflow deploys.

decomposition.rationale: Single routing contract defect — all client routes fail the same way (server 404). One fix (index.html fallback) addresses every affected path.
